    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    Database
    Database class for managing person records.
    Employee
    Represents an employee, which is a type of Person.
    Faculty
    Represents a faculty member, which is a type of Employee.
    Person
    Represents a person with basic contact information.
    Staff
    Represents a staff member, which is a type of Employee.
    Student
    Represents a student, which is a type of Person.
    TestSchoolRecords
    Driver class for testing the School Records application.
